prompt.content:
The management suspects that the hiring manager has a negative view of the candidates with higher work experience. Calculate the difference in average experience score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who were advanced past the hiring manager review stage. Also, calculate the difference in composite score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who were advanced past the hiring manager review stage, for comparison.

Composite score is the average of average skill rating, average overall interview and average cultural fit ratings. Experience score for all candidates is incorrectly represented on a scale of 0 to 1, Adjust the values on the scale of 0 to 10 instead. Refer to the files 'Candidate Pipeline Stage Tracker.xlsx' and 'Executive_Candidate_Comparison_Matrix.xlsx'.

Provide your answers in the console, rounded to three decimal places.

rubrics.name: States that the difference in average experience score of all the candidates... (ver_f458fc6bf656465980e58bec41acdeb0)

messages.content: States that the difference in average experience score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who advanced past the hiring manager review stage is 0.396 (acceptable range 0.392 to 0.400).

rubrics.name: States that the difference in average composite score of all the candidates... (ver_78aa931149e54a5497819bc0402d458a)

messages.content: States that the difference in average composite score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who advanced past the hiring manager review stage is -0.290 (acceptable range -0.293 to -0.287).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Difference in average experience score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who advanced past the hiring manager review stage: 0.396 
Difference in average composite score of all the candidates rejected at hiring manager review stage v/s those who advanced past the hiring manager review stage: -0.290
